original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Charlotte, Scarlett, Mia, and Noah. Charlotte remarked, "If Noah is a knight then Scarlett is a knight". Scarlett noted, "Noah is a knave and Mia is a knave". As Mia put it, "Scarlett is a knight if and only if Charlotte is a knave". "Mia is not a knave" - Noah. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
